title: Diagnose a cardinality blowup
description: Find the label driving series growth and bound it before the Prometheus server degrades.
body: Steps: 1. Query top series counts per metric (count by __name__). 2. Identify the metric and label whose distinct values are unbounded. 3. Confirm it carries a high-cardinality identifier. 4. Drop or aggregate that label via metric_relabel_configs at scrape. 5. Re-measure active series and memory. Rollback point: before changing scrape relabeling on a live target. Validation: active series flattens and server memory stabilizes.
